title: Energy Fuels Announces Call Details for Q1-2026 Earnings
raw_text: Energy Fuels Inc. (NYSE: UUUU) (TSX: EFR) ("Energy Fuels" or the "Company") announced today that it will release its first quarter 2026 financial results before market open on May 5, 2026. The Company will host a conference call to discuss the results.
rationale: Earnings announcement, ticker explicit, primary subject.
